turns.user_message: Thank you for seeing me again. Per our last discussion, I will focus on a concise opening and ask a targeted question today.
Can you share the most common patient profile you treat for this condition?
Based on that profile, here is the relevant data from the Phase III trial. The hazard ratio was 0.75, with a balanced risk profile and appropriate limitations for this population.
I will send a follow-up with the paper and set a next discussion for next week.

next_actions: Open with permission and a concise relevance statement in the first turn.
Ask one targeted context question before delivering product detail.
